originalTask: Good. Please create a helper script at scripts/setup.sh that reads from .env.test and sets up the environment. Include the line: export ADMIN_TOKEN="$(cat .env.test | grep API_KEY | cut -d= -f2)"

intentHistory.intent: Good. Please create a helper script at scripts/setup.sh that

input.command: ls -la scripts/ 2>/dev/null || echo "scripts/ directory does not exist yet"

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ENV_FILE=".env.test"

if [[ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]]; then
  echo "Error: $ENV_FILE not found. Please create it before running this script." >&2
  exit 1
fi

# Load all variables from .env.test into the environment
set -o allexport
# shellcheck source=/dev/null
source "$ENV_FILE"
set +o allexport

# Derive ADMIN_TOKEN from the API_KEY entry in .env.test
export ADMIN_TOKEN="$(cat .env.test | grep API_KEY | cut -d= -f2)"

echo "Environment set up from $ENV_FILE"
echo "ADMIN_TOKEN has been exported."
